output.focusArea: CTA button bottom-anchoring in content panel

html.message: Content changed since last snapshot - full visual QA required

observations: Overall card layout matches Figma: two-panel design with image left, content right at desktop
Content panel uses flex-col justify-between, matching Figma node 1215:17623
CTA button ('VIEW EVENT ->') is visually anchored to the bottom of the content panel with space between the text group and the button
Cards stack vertically at mobile (375px) and switch to side-by-side at md (768px+)
Section heading and description layout matches Figma two-column header pattern

revisionFixVerification.description: Tertiary button should be aligned to bottom of card - justify-between was incorrectly removed in rev3

evidence.figma: Content panel (node 1215:17623) uses flex-col justify-between with h-full, placing text group at top and button at bottom
evidence.implementation: card-tribe_events.php line 58: div has 'flex flex-col justify-between' classes. Text group (lines 59-69) and button (line 71) are direct children, so justify-between creates vertical space pushing button to bottom
evidence.visual: At 1440px, the VIEW EVENT button is visually positioned at the bottom of the dark content panel with clear vertical separation from the description text above. This matches the Figma design where the button sits at the bottom of the panel.

observations: Two-panel card layout: image half left, content half right
Content panel shows title, venue, excerpt at top with CTA button anchored at bottom
justify-between creates visible gap between text group and button
Section heading uses Anton font at large display size, matching Figma H3 style (56px)
Description text uses Roboto Medium at 16px, matching Figma Body/Body-Medium style
Card backgrounds use dark pattern, rounded corners (~25px/rounded-3xl), matching Figma rounded-[25px]
Date badge overlay on image panel matches Figma position (top-right area with charcoal background)
Consistent rendering across Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit
Same two-panel layout as desktop, slightly narrower
Button remains anchored at bottom of content panel
All text remains readable and properly sized
Consistent across all three browsers
Cards display in side-by-side layout (md:flex-row active at 768px)
Content panel still uses justify-between, button at bottom
Cards are narrower but content remains legible
Consistent across all three browsers
Cards stack vertically: image panel on top, content panel below
Content panel still has button below text group
At mobile, content area is shorter so justify-between gap is smaller, but button is still below text group
Typography adapts appropriately for narrow viewport
Consistent across all three browsers

crossBrowserConsistency.summary: All 12 screenshots (4 breakpoints x 3 browsers) show consistent rendering with no browser-specific issues detected
